post_text: In March 2019, a P-3C from the Pakistan Naval Air Arm intercepted an Indian submarine attempting to enter Pakistani waters at night. In October 2021, Pakistani Orions again intercepted an Indian Kalvari class submarine and blocked it from entering Pakistani Waters at the Arabian Sea. #paknavy #pakarmy #pakistanzindabad #fyp #foryou

metadata.event: an Indian air strike against a militant camp in Pakistan in February 2019
